title: lobelia lisowskii
intro: Lobelia lisowskii, also known as Polish lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the respiratory system and act as a bronchodilator. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and improving circulation. In herbal preparations, lobelia is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential side effects.
